{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323150011BD26D4D5C960573AFF6F"}"},"total":146},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7612694513403888409","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的好啊，总算是找到了魂味特浓的书了，不是那种用所谓“无限复活”就当魂特点的云玩，也不是纯照本宣科复刻魂剧情但是战斗特色一点都没表现，而是很好的融合了魂类的核心玩法特色和各种彩蛋，原来你一直与我同在😭😭😭","text_exts":[{"e":31,"s":27,"text":"无限复活","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%97%A0%E9%99%90%E5%A4%8D%E6%B4%BB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774249212573AFF6F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227612694513403888409%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227592497352204635161%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%97%A0%E9%99%90%E5%A4%8D%E6%B4%BB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772470201,"group_id":"7592497352204635161","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"海豚人，寸拳心","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8fAu7YKAt5BTcsTAkHw8eM=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bd93e5f1c37148f69619cbf4cde33d5e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794895&x-signature=sd%2BPiYLYKw%2BmObuXBsMiOQTLhAk%3D","user_id":"312680885257485","user_name":"🐬突击"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"312680885257485","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":30,"fan_ranklist_title":"彗星客","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7592497352204635161","book_info":{"abstract":"（评分刚出，慢慢会上来的）
【诸天无限+唯一玩家+魂游机制】【轻松整活+剧情流+战斗爽】
为了一千万的对赌协议，葛文参加了号称史上最真实的全息魂游【无限恐怖之魂】的内测。
果然！
轮回空间的主神，真就说话说一半！
“真没任务引导的吗？那我自由发挥啦？”
加点系统味真足！
【生命力、集中力、持久力、耐力、力量、敏捷、智力、信仰、运气】
“不管了！真男人，就要无用之人开局！然后练水桶号！”
……
《生化危机》？世界末日？那正是为王的理由！
威斯克：“为什么我每次瞬移到他背后，他都能面对我！！！”
遇见异形，先上隐身，对着身后的红点来发正义背刺；
工程师：“什么？这个人形生物是我族的造物主？”
用烟特大剑在霍格沃茨cos魔杖；
伏地魔：“除你武器！除你武器！！除你武器！！！啊！！！怎么回事？”
鬼片副本：梦回小隆德，祝福质变+阳光疗愈好用到爆；
“弹反”在手，强制处决霸天虎；
擎天柱：“葛文才是我族当之无愧的新王！”
用灵魂激流在山达尔星对波力量宝石；
最终，999水桶属性的我，穿着兜裆布围着灭霸“翻滚”
灭霸：“刀都舞成直升机了！打不到？”
……
